🔴 Just in: Tesla disclosed a ~$12B move.

Map filing to next dated catalyst on the calendar before sizing risk.

Key size disclosed: ~$12.0B.

Items filed: Item 2: 02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition; Item 2: 02 of Form 8-K, "Results of Operations and Financial Condition" and shall not be deemed "filed" for purposes of Section; Item 9: 01 Financial Statements and Exhibits.

Demand vs supply (what actually moves the stock):.

Next dated catalyst: 2026-08-20.

First major lock-up unlock (~7% pool; roughly doubles tradable float).

Pattern flagged: infrastructure before supply step.

SPCX $116.65 (-14% vs IPO).

Source:
Tesla Inc | 8-K | 2026-07-22
https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1318605/000162828026049213/tsla-20260722.htm

items.linkedin_post:
🔴 Just in: Elon Musk just filed a Form 4.

Insider transaction reported (Form 4).

Company 8-Ks tell you what the vehicle did.

Form 4 tells you what the person did.

Those are not the same trade.

Form 4 is direct personal ledger: shares sold, exercised, or gifted change his cash and control. Size and timing vs price strength test H2 (sell into demand)..

The dossier thesis is simple.

Hype builds a vehicle.

Control stays concentrated.

Cash exits when shares sell into demand.

TSLA Form 4 sales are the active personal liquidity channel (~$40B cumulative in our ledger).

SPCX economic stake is still gated by lock-ups.

Next dated supply step: 2026-08-20.

First major lock-up unlock (~7% pool; roughly doubles tradable float).

Source:
Elon Musk (CIK 1494730) | 4 | 2026-06-17
https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1494730/000162828026044069/xslF345X06/wk-form4_1781740812.xml

Dossier: https://kaydeep0.github.io/musk-empire-dossier/

Educational only. Not investment advice.

items.linkedin_post:
🔴 Just in: SpaceX priced ~$25B of inaugural bonds.

No new shares. This is a debt print, not an equity unlock.

The filing prices senior unsecured notes.

Five tranches. Roughly $25B total.

Coupons run 5.35% to 6.65%.

Maturities run 2031 to 2056.

Expected settlement: June 26, 2026.

Use of proceeds: intends to use the net proceeds from the Notes offering to repay the outstanding borrowings under its bridge loan facility in full, to pay related fees and expenses, and any rem.

The June IPO gave SpaceX public-market cash.

But the Goldman bridge from the Twitter to X to xAI debt relay was still on the balance sheet.

So the company did not need to sell new shares to fix the cap table.

It issued bonds instead.

That means no new insider shares hit the tape from this filing.

Markets may read it as refi relief.

One overhang cleared before the supply calendar wakes up.

But the prospectus still has a date circled: 2026-08-20.

First major lock-up unlock (~7% pool; roughly doubles tradable float).

Infrastructure filings and supply filings are different animals.

One fixes the balance sheet.

The other changes who can sell.

The pattern our dossier tracks: infrastructure before supply step.

Bond/refi filings (bridge repayment) landed before the first major lock-up unlock (Aug 2026). Company clears bank overhang before tradable float expands , reduces forced-sale risk, does not reduce insider share count.

SPCX last $156.11. +16% vs the $135 IPO. -26% vs the day-one high.

Source:
Space Exploration Technologies (SPCX) | 8-K | 2026-06-23
https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1181412/000162828026044955/spcx-pricing8xk.htm

Dossier: https://kaydeep0.github.io/musk-empire-dossier/

Educational only. Not investment advice.
